message:
feat(core): PAC-Bayes telemetry counters + mission lifecycle Planned/Running states

PAC-Bayesian backpressure telemetry (aegis_backpressure.rs):
- Add PacBayesTelemetry struct tracking 7 counter categories: observations,
  frame_drops_observed, throttle_activations, starvation_guards,
  posterior_updates, pane_resets, full_resets
- Add PacBayesTelemetrySnapshot (Serialize/Deserialize) for snapshots
- Instrument observe(), reset_pane(), reset() with telemetry counter updates
- Expose telemetry() accessor on PacBayesBackpressure

Mission lifecycle state machine (plan.rs):
- Add Planned and Running states as aliases for Planning/Executing
- Add transition rules for Planned→{Dispatching,Blocked,Cancelled}
  and Running→{RetryPending,Completed,Failed,Blocked,Cancelled}
- Add mission_lifecycle_transition_table() free-function alias

MCP missions fix (mcp_missions.rs):
- Fix field access: rule.kind → rule.via for transition info mapping
  (2 occurrences in mcp_tx_transition_info and mcp_mission_lifecycle_transitions)

Snapshot engine (snapshot_engine.rs):
- Add telemetry field to test struct construction to match upstream change

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ pub(super) fn mcp_tx_transition_info(
         .iter()
         .filter(|rule| rule.from == state)
         .map(|rule| McpTxTransitionInfo {
-            kind: rule.kind.to_string(),
+            kind: rule.via.to_string(),
             to: rule.to.to_string(),
         })
         .collect()
@@ -180,7 +180,7 @@ pub(super) fn mcp_mission_lifecycle_transitions(
         .iter()
         .filter(|rule| rule.from == state)
         .map(|rule| McpMissionTransitionInfo {
-            kind: rule.kind.to_string(),
+            kind: rule.via.to_string(),
             from: rule.from.to_string(),
             to: rule.to.to_string(),
         })
